entries.title: Android App Auto-Update Implementation
entries.content:
Implemented in-app auto-update feature for OpenClaw Android app.

## Changes Made
- Created UpdateChecker.kt - checks The Hub API for new versions, downloads APK with progress tracking, triggers install prompt
- Added auto-update UI in SettingsSheet.kt - shows update status, download progress bar, changelog preview, and install button
- Integrated with MainViewModel.kt - StateFlow observables for updateAvailable, updateChecking, updateDownloading, downloadProgress, updateError

## Technical Details
- Version endpoint: GET /api/app-version?current=X.Y.Z
- External URL for Tailscale: http://100.112.56.61:3000/openclaw.apk
- Fallback URLs tried in order: Tailscale IP, local LAN IP, localhost
- FileProvider used for APK installation on Android 7+

## Issues Fixed
1. Missing REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES permission - required for Android 8+
2. FileProvider path mismatch - cache directory needed to be accessible
3. Install intent flags - added FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP and FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION

## Versions Released
- v2026.3.19.1 - Initial implementation
- v2026.3.19.2 - Fixed install permission and FileProvider paths
